message:
Update CSS utilities, layout, and TypeScript config for redesign

globals.css:
- Add 3D perspective utility classes (perspective-500/1000/2000,
  transform-style-3d, backface-visible/hidden) used by the new
  PromptCard 3D tilt effect and other depth-based interactions

layout.tsx:
- Add MouseSpotlight import for desktop cursor spotlight overlay
- NOTE: This file has a structural issue from a concurrent edit
  where generateStaticParams and the LocaleLayout function
  definition were partially removed — needs follow-up fix

tsconfig.json:
- Include .next/dev/types/**/*.ts in the TypeScript compilation
  scope to resolve type checking for Next.js 16 dev server
  generated types

Providers.tsx:
- Minor provider configuration adjustments

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
